About Me

My name is Muhammad Rafiif Dzakwan. I am an Informatics student at Universitas Al-Azhar Indonesia, specializing in Data Analysis, Web Development, and Cyber Security. As the President of the Student Executive Board (BEM FST), I blend technical execution with strong leadership to deliver impactful solutions both in tech and academia. I recently completed a Full-Stack Developer internship at Pusdiklat Keuangan Publik, BPPK - Kementerian Keuangan RI, where I built a web-based attendance monitoring portal.
